description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, surrounded by landscaped greenery and mature trees. The exterior features a mix of white and light tan wall panels, large glass windows, and dark accent elements, creating a clean and contemporary appearance. The front of the house includes a paved driveway leading to a main entrance with a glass door and adjacent windows, while the rear opens to a spacious backyard with a lawn and additional trees. The roof appears to have multiple levels and sections, some of which may be accessible or used as terraces. The house is set on a rectangular plot with well-maintained grass and shrubbery along the perimeter. The overall structure emphasizes open space, natural light, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard, featuring a mix of white and tan exterior panels and surrounded by trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and landscaped greenery with trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, tan wall panels, and a large backyard area with dense trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard lawn, extensive tree coverage, and large windows facing the garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tan wall, side garden, and additional trees, with less visible entry features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a glass door, adjacent windows, paved driveway, and minimal overhang, framed by landscaping.
